data.current_description: Export all geographic unit definitions in the specified format.
data.description_suggestion: Exports all geographic unit definitions in the requested format (CSV, Excel, or JSON). Requires a format parameter specifying the desired export format. Returns the geographic units data serialized in the specified format with codes, names, and types.

data.current_description: Retrieve indicator data filtered by geographic units and/or indicator codes. At least one geoUnit or indicator query parameter must be provided.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves indicator data filtered by geographic units and/or indicator codes. Requires at least one geoUnit or indicator query parameter. Returns indicator data records containing values, years, and metadata for the specified geographic units and indicators. Supports filtering by multiple geo-units and indicators in a single request.
data.reasoning: Description explains the constraint (at least one parameter required) but lacks details about what data is returned. Added information about the structure of returned data (values, years, metadata) and clarified that multiple filters can be combined.
